## Entities.Fillings.IProcedureRefEntity type

Reference to a procedure that can be used with a filling recipe. Contains the procedure ID and optional notes.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type IProcedureRefEntity = Model.IRefWithNotes<ProcedureId>;
```
